task_summary: SP26 makes user-facing mew-wisp human/cat terminal output use foreground repo-local live desk reads by default, while --fixture-terminal preserves deterministic fixture display and state/html keep explicit --live-desk behavior.

tests_run.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format human --form cat --fixture-terminal --watch-count 1 --interval 0 --output /tmp/mew-wisp-sp26-fixture-terminal.txt
tests_run.result: fixture-terminal cat render wrote deterministic output with desk disabled

tests_run.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format human --form cat --watch-count 1 --interval 0 --output /tmp/mew-wisp-sp26-default-live.txt
tests_run.result: default cat render used live-desk status/action from repo-local mew
